# OpenCatalogi

> OpenCatalogi is an open-source publication catalog app for the Nextcloud workspace.

OpenCatalogi is an open-source publication catalog app for the Nextcloud workspace. It lets government bodies publish, index, and share catalogs of software, services, and data through a single user interface, and ingests metadata from GitHub, GitLab, and external APIs via PublicCode.yml. The app supports WOO compliance (Public Access to Government Information Act) and standardized organization profiles, making public-sector information discoverable to citizens, businesses, and other agencies. Released under EUPL-1.2 and maintained by Conduction since 2019.

## Docs

- [Tutorials](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/tutorials): step-by-step walkthroughs.
- [Features](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/Features): what the app does, organised by capability.
- [Use cases](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/UseCases): real customer scenarios.
- [Integrations](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/Integrations): which external systems the app talks to.
- [Technical](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/Technical): architecture, data model, security posture.
- [User guide](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/user-guide): end-user documentation.
- [API](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/api): OpenAPI reference.

## Optional

- [Install](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl/installation): install from the Nextcloud app store.
- [Source](https://opencatalogi.conduction.nl): repository and issue tracker.
- [App page](https://www.conduction.nl/apps/opencatalogi): product positioning on conduction.nl.
